summary: A montage set to music of masked ICE/ERO agents escorting handcuffed and chained detainees through an office corridor. On-screen overlays name an individual ('YONEL LEON HERNANDEZ') and list immigration charges. The final shot is a slow-motion close-up of an armored ERO agent raising binoculars.

script.scene: A masked ICE agent escorts a handcuffed young man (wearing a Michael Kors sweatshirt) down a beige office hallway toward camera; another detainee follows behind.
Close on the chained detainee; red box overlay names 'YONEL LEON HERNANDEZ' and lists 'CUSTODY REDETERMINATION/ FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ALTERNATIVES TO DETENTION REQUIREMENTS.'
A masked detainee in an N95 and a green jacket walks forward down a bright white corridor, hands cuffed at the waist with a belly chain visible.
An ICE agent in a black balaclava grips the arm of a green-hooded detainee, moving him through a doorway.
Slow-motion shot: an armored ERO agent (yellow 'ERO' on vest) raises binoculars to his face in sunlight, framed through a vehicle window.

notable_text: CUSTODY REDETERMINATION/ FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ALTERNATIVES TO DETENTION REQUIREMENTS
If you're in the United States and you are illegally present, spare yourself the hassle and self-deport.
